variants: Hadley Evers, a prominent expert in International Business, is best known for her innovative invention, the Parallax Data Cycler. This groundbreaking work earned her the famous Wavecrest Trophy, highlighting her impact in the industry. Her academic journey was shaped by the insightful mentorship of Carmen Afolabi, her doctoral advisor. Hadley's dedication and passion continue to push the boundaries of her field.
